title: Navahrudak Heavy Rain
lead: Navahrudak is experiencing a critical heavy rain event with a Z-Score of -3.03. This anomaly has a Score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme weather conditions.
body:
The heavy rain in Navahrudak is causing significant disruptions to daily life. 
 The high humidity of 96% and moderate wind speed of 16.2 km/h are exacerbating the situation. 
 The HDD of 11.6 GG and CDD of 0.0 GG suggest a significant impact on heating and energy demand.
conclusion: Implement emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heavy rain.
